pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the Zero Trust Environment with Containerized Solution repository, explaining its purpose as an MIT Lab research project and high-level architecture

pages.title: Build System
pages.purpose: Document the build infrastructure, including compilation of security variants and artifact management

pages.title: Makefile and Compilation
pages.purpose: Detail the Makefile targets for building zookd/zookfs variants with different security configurations (exstack, nxstack, withssp)

pages.title: Build Artifacts and Version Control
pages.purpose: Explain ignored files, build outputs, and version control configuration across the repository

pages.title: Development Environment
pages.purpose: Document editor configurations and development setup (Vim settings, tab preferences)

pages.title: Core Server Infrastructure
pages.purpose: Overview of the C-based server components including HTTP handling and server variants

pages.title: HTTP Server Implementation
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of the C HTTP server, request parsing, CGI execution, and URL handling

pages.title: Zookd Server Variants
pages.purpose: Explain the different zookd builds (exstack, nxstack, withssp) and their security characteristics

pages.title: Configuration System
pages.purpose: Document the zook.conf parser and configuration management system

pages.title: Deployment Scripts
pages.purpose: Explain clean-env.sh and clean-ldd.sh for setting up predictable execution environments with ASLR disabled

pages.title: Zoobar Web Application
pages.purpose: Overview of the Flask-based Zoobar application and its containerized architecture

pages.title: Application Structure and Routing
pages.purpose: Document the Flask application initialization, URL routing, middleware, and entry points

pages.title: Authentication System
pages.purpose: Detail the RPC-based authentication server, token management, and credential handling

pages.title: Container Architecture and Isolation
pages.purpose: Explain the LXC container setup (static, dynamic, auth, bank, profile) and firewall rules enforcing Zero Trust

pages.title: Database Architecture
pages.purpose: Document the separated database design (person.db, cred.db, bank.db) and schema validation

pages.title: Profile System
pages.purpose: Explain user profile scripts, code execution sandbox, and profile functionality (granter, visit tracking, etc.)

pages.title: API and RPC Communication
pages.purpose: Document the api.py abstraction layer and FIFO-based RPC mechanism for inter-service communication

pages.title: Testing Framework
pages.purpose: Overview of the comprehensive testing infrastructure for security validation and exploit testing

pages.title: Lab 1: Exploit Testing
pages.purpose: Document the check-crash, check-exstack, check-libc, and check-challenge targets for testing exploits against different security variants

pages.title: Lab 2: Container Security Tests
pages.purpose: Detailed explanation of check-lab2.py testing container isolation, firewall rules, database separation, and token security

pages.title: HTTP Client Testing
pages.purpose: Document z_client.py module for automated HTTP testing with wget, including registration, login, transfers, and balance verification

pages.title: Additional Documentation
pages.purpose: Supplementary information including licenses, configuration files, and miscellaneous resources

pages.title: License Information
pages.purpose: Document the MIT License terms for both the repository root and lab assignments
